name: recent-research
description: Product-style skill for recent public signal research, comparisons, source diagnostics, and shareable reports.

interface.shortDescription: Research recent public signals for a topic.
interface.longDescription: A product-style research skill that gathers recent public evidence from low-friction sources such as GitHub, Hacker News, Reddit, and Google News RSS, then guides the agent to synthesize a concise source-grounded brief with gaps, follow-up checks, and interpretation separated.
defaultPrompt: Use Recent Research to brief me on recent public signals for this topic.
Use Recent Research to compare recent developer chatter around two products.
